title: ageratum corymbosum f. lactiflorum
intro: Ageratum corymbosum f. lactiflorum, also known as White Flossflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Ageratum genus. It is known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ageratum corymbosum f. lactiflorum is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
